title: Elements of Power | Channel Trailer
look: epic cosmic fantasy digital painting, cinematic movie frame, deep space nebula and storm clouds backdrop in dark navy and charcoal, glowing elemental energy, luminous sci fi light, majestic and reverent, rich color with soft rose pink accents, highly detailed, no text, no words, no letters

scenes.label: Five elements. Real science. Sacred power.
scenes.narr: There are five elements. Earth. Water. Fire. Air. Spirit. And inside every one of them is a power that science is only beginning to measure.

scenes.ref: Real studies, cited in every episode
scenes.narr: Grounding studies watched the stress hormone cortisol settle when skin met soil.
scenes.vis: bare feet on dark rich soil with golden light rising, roots of light spreading, cosmic sky

scenes.narr: Blue space research across eighteen countries links time near water to a slower heart and a calmer mind.
scenes.vis: luminous turquoise ocean under a starry cosmic sky, glowing blue mist

scenes.narr: A fire study of two hundred and twenty six people watched blood pressure fall by the crackling flame.
scenes.vis: sacred campfire of gold and orange embers rising into deep cosmic night

scenes.narr: Stanford found that five minutes a day of slow sighing breath lifted mood more than meditation.
scenes.vis: silver luminous wind spirals and a glowing breath of light over mountain peaks under stars

scenes.narr: And awe itself, that shiver of wonder, is linked to lower inflammation in your blood.
scenes.vis: a violet nebula of divine light descending as a radiant column through cosmic clouds, sacred awe

scenes.label:
You were built
to hold the elements.
scenes.narr: You were built to hold the elements. Every episode takes one real study and turns it into one sacred practice you can activate today.
scenes.vis: five orbs of light, green, blue, orange, silver, violet, orbiting in a cosmic circle of rose light

scenes.label:
Join the Activate the
Elements challenge.
scenes.narr: Join the Activate the Elements challenge. Earth. Water. Fire. Air. Spirit. Your power is waiting. Subscribe and begin.
